success_criteria: Dynamic specialist for goal keywords: service factory, autonomous product delivery, spawn

commands_run.command: rg -n "Service Factory|Stella Factory|Antigravity|dispatch|Probe|heartbeat|continuation|capability map|agent topology|final audit" -S SOT docs src .

findings_or_risks: Current Atelier already has Factory invocation, project analysis, Probe, evidence logging, and safety gates; the main product gap is durable run-state visibility rather than raw execution capability.

The recommended ship-now scope is a Factory Run Control Loop, not a full autonomous multi-agent mesh. This intentionally defers deeper specialist automation until trust, continuation, and gate semantics are visible.
A below-provider command policy layer is still unresolved. Full-permission provider tool calls remain a known constraint and should not be treated as solved by this brief alone.
Independent product-owner validation has not happened in this subagent run, so the brief should be treated as ready for review rather than final-approved scope.
child_result.next_step: Review and approve the ship-now scope boundary, then dispatch the next Service Factory stages for capability map, agent topology, roadmap, and readiness-state bootstrap using this brief as the controlling product frame.

commands_run.command: rg -n "Service Factory|Stella Factory|Antigravity|dispatch|Probe|heartbeat|continuation|capability map|agent topology|final audit" -S SOT docs src .

findings_or_risks: Current Atelier already has Factory invocation, project analysis, Probe, evidence logging, and safety gates; the main product gap is durable run-state visibility rather than raw execution capability.

The recommended ship-now scope is a Factory Run Control Loop, not a full autonomous multi-agent mesh. This intentionally defers deeper specialist automation until trust, continuation, and gate semantics are visible.
A below-provider command policy layer is still unresolved. Full-permission provider tool calls remain a known constraint and should not be treated as solved by this brief alone.
Independent product-owner validation has not happened in this subagent run, so the brief should be treated as ready for review rather than final-approved scope.
agent_results.next_step: Review and approve the ship-now scope boundary, then dispatch the next Service Factory stages for capability map, agent topology, roadmap, and readiness-state bootstrap using this brief as the controlling product frame.

agent_topology.agent_creation_rule: AgentBlueprint designs specialists; AgentInstance proves a spawned/run unit; AgentManifest is reusable only after a manifest exists.
not_agent_creation: result file only without a blueprint/instance link

phases.name: Current State Discovery
phases.rule: Inspect the real repo, runtime, installed app, SOT, dirty paths, existing capabilities, risks, and verification baseline before deciding implementation.

phases.name: Goal-to-Plan Strategy
phases.rule: Convert the goal and current-state baseline into a gap analysis, ordered task packets, role assignments, owned paths, done_when, and verification strategy.

phases.name: Execution and Evidence Loop
phases.rule: Execute bounded task packets, integrate changes, run Probe/security/release/final-audit gates, and loop back to planning on failure or missing evidence.

operating_contract.rule: Always inspect current state first, then write a goal-to-plan strategy, then execute and verify. Do not start implementation before current-state and development-plan artifacts exist unless the user explicitly requests a trivial one-shot task.

goal: Atelier Stella Factory를 Antigravity식 다중 에이전트 자율 개발 공장으로 고도화한다. 단일 기능 완료로 종료하지 않고 research, capability map, agent topology, dispatch/collect, Probe, security, release, final audit, heartbeat-ready continuation까지 이어간다.

kanban_projection.truth_rule: Kanban cards visualize queues only; Stella command_owner and AgentTopology remain the source of truth.

operating_contract.rule: 현재 상태를 먼저 파악하고, 목표 달성 계획을 정리한 뒤, 실행/검증 루프로 진행한다.

roles.purpose: Request normalization, priority, and boundary decisions
State ledger, dispatch/collect, gates, and delivery control under Stella command
Implementation across bounded files and surfaces
Independent UI/API/runtime smoke and security assertions
Static/code security and specialist security routing
Dynamic specialist for goal keywords: service factory, autonomous product delivery, spawn
Dynamic specialist for goal keywords: auth, oauth, permission

run_log.next_step: resume state, refresh readiness report, dispatch the next executable milestone
